metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex skills for AI reports, decks and client sharing: publish research as live web reports, recurring client reports, view-tracked proposals, responsive slide decks, and a design-polish pass — all via the ReportRoom MCP with view analytics returned to the agent.

plugins.name: report-skills
plugins.description: Bundle of 5 report and deck publishing skills for Claude Code and Codex: report-publisher (research → live tracked report), client-reporter (recurring branded client deliverables), proposal-tracker (view-tracked proposal links), deck-publisher (content → responsive slide deck), report-designer (design-bar polish pass). Powered by the ReportRoom MCP: design system fetch, HTML authoring, lint, one-call publish, view analytics.
